cast.name: 茵格保加·达坤耐特 Ingeborga Dapkunaite
斯坦尼斯拉夫·邦达连科 Stanislav Bondarenko
维拉·科列斯尼科娃 Vera Kolesnikova

introduction: The plot is based on the mysterious disappearance of the mother of the protagonist, police officer Artyom. Irina, that's the name of Artyom's mother, suddenly disappears from the house, leaving no trace. But this is only at first glance. As an experienced policeman, Artyom still finds a few clues, gradually starting to find traces and more and more evidence. His investigation, unfortunately, does not bring him as much good information as he expected. But he discovers something else.
